subject: Maintenance report: docs-review scan complete
body:
# Docs Review — 2026-05-22

I completed a scan of the documentation in `D:\Drive\Source\SquadDash-public\docs`.

## Findings

### ✅ Healthy
- All internal links in `getting-started/installation.md` resolve correctly
- No orphaned images found

### ⚠️ Needs attention
- **`docs/features/annotation-editor.md`** — references a screenshot at `images/measure-line-toolbar.png` that does not exist on disk yet
- **`docs/getting-started/installation.md`** — external link to the WinGet manifest repo returns 404 (manifest not yet submitted)

### 📋 Suggestions
- The measurement line tool added this sprint has no documentation entry yet
- Consider adding a `docs/features/inbox.md` page now that the Inbox system is live

---
*This is a simulated maintenance report to test the inbox popup window and action buttons.*

actions.label: Document the Inbox feature
actions.prompt: Please create a new documentation page at `docs/features/inbox.md` covering the Inbox panel feature in SquadDash. The Inbox is an AI-to-user messaging system: agents (coordinator or argus-weld) can send messages via INBOX_MESSAGE_JSON blocks, which appear as a list in the Inbox panel. Clicking a message opens a popup window showing the subject, from/timestamp, optional attachments, optional action buttons, and a Markdown body. Action buttons are deferred quick-replies — clicking one injects a self-contained prompt into the queue. Messages are stored in `.squad/inbox/` as JSON files. This was implemented in commits 9a8fc3a (storage), 6ec17f5 (panel), f93cb50 (prompt injection), 7082396 (actions model), c429407 (action buttons), 9af136b (popup window).

actions.label: Add screenshot placeholder task
actions.prompt: Add a low-priority task to .squad/tasks.md: 'Add missing screenshot docs/images/measure-line-toolbar.png — referenced in annotation-editor.md but not yet captured. Use the screenshot placeholder format in the doc.'
